commit.message:
Fix auto-save restore: push content into editors from OnInitializedAsync

The previous fix put the editor sync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender),
but firstRender fires BEFORE RestoreAutoSavedState completes (the first
await yields to the renderer). By the time the restore sets
hasRestoredState=true, OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender=true) has already
run and won't fire again.

Fix: move the editor push into OnInitializedAsync, right after
RestoreAutoSavedState returns. At that point the editors exist (the
component rendered during the await) so SetValue works. Also guard
OnSchemaEditorInit to skip the model-overwrite when a restore is pending.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix boot progress to track full download completion, not just headers

fetch() resolves when response headers arrive, but the body may still
be streaming. Now reads the full arrayBuffer before incrementing the
progress counter, then wraps it in a new Response for Blazor to consume.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix duplicate 'Compiling' console line and auto-save restore mismatch

Two fixes:
1. RunAsync wrote 'Compiling...' twice to console - removed the duplicate.
2. Auto-save restore ran after first render, so Monaco editors had stale
   content from OnInitialized while the model (schemaFiles, activeSampleId)
   was updated by the async restore. Added hasRestoredState flag and
   OnAfterRenderAsync logic to push restored content into the editors
   after they are ready, wrapped in isLoadingContent guard to prevent
   DetachFromSample.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix sample dropdown: guard against DetachFromSample during programmatic loads, format XML docs in tooltips

Two fixes:
1. Sample selection immediately reset to 'Custom project' because setting
   editor content fired OnSchemaContentChanged -> DetachFromSample. Added
   isLoadingContent guard flag set during sample loads, new project, open
   project, and auto-save restore.
2. 'New' button showed 'Data Object' because activeSampleId was set to a
   non-existent option value. Now uses null consistently for non-sample
   states, matching the '-- Custom project --' placeholder.
3. Signature help tooltips showed raw XML documentation. Added XML doc
   parser that extracts summary, returns, remarks, and per-parameter docs
   into clean Markdown text. JS side passes docs as MarkdownString for
   proper rendering.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Task.Yield() before heavy sync work to improve UI responsiveness

In single-threaded Blazor WASM, synchronous Roslyn compilation and code
generation block the UI thread entirely. Add Task.Yield() calls before
heavy work in GenerateAsync, RunAsync, live diagnostics, and
CompilationService.CompileAsync so the browser can render status updates
(spinner, progress text) before the thread is blocked.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Cattle Health Monitoring System

- C_RESTAPI: FastAPI backend with MongoDB Atlas
  - JWT + API key authentication
  - Cattle CRUD, sensor data ingestion (bulk)
  - Health evaluation with threshold-based alerts
  - Email notifications with 48h health graphs
  - Role-based access (super_admin/admin/user)

- C_FRONTEND: Streamlit dashboard
  - MongoDB-inspired dark/light theme (default: light)
  - Role-based dashboards (Super Admin/Admin/User)
  - Multi-language support (English/Tamil/Hindi)
  - Real-time cattle health graphs (Plotly)
  - Cattle management, user management, alerts
  - Integrated logo and professional UI

- .gitignore configured (venv, .env, __pycache__, IDE files)
- .env.example files for both frontend and backend

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix Monaco race condition: delay Blazor start until Monaco loaded

BlazorMonaco silently fails (console error, no retry) if the monaco
global isn't available when it tries to create editors. On hard refresh,
the AMD require for vs/editor/editor.main may not complete before
Blazor renders the StandaloneCodeEditor components.

Fix: use autostart=false on blazor.webassembly.js and gate Blazor.start()
on a monacoReady promise that resolves when the AMD require completes.
The require() call is issued before jsInterop.js loads (which clobbers
the AMD require with a plain config object).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(api): enforce squad number immutability on PUT (#529)

Add a mismatch guard in put_async: if squad_number in the request
body does not match the path parameter, return HTTP 400 Bad Request.
The path parameter is the authoritative source of identity on PUT.

Document the single-model design decision in PlayerRequestModel:
one model intentionally covers both POST and PUT, with per-operation
differences handled at the route layer.

450 improve performance of hot paths and bump preferred sprouts version (#451)

* improve performance when checking if a component area has an opaque gradient or noise

* only intern the 'LayerRenderConf' inside the 'LayerCache' when caching makes sense to avoid interning, which produces a lot of expensive hash code computation

* improve style renderer hot path performance slightly by reducing redundant color instantiation

* avoid array allocation for all layer constants as 'values()' always returns a defensive copy

* avoid null check on every intern

* reduce array allocation for layer constants and avoid setting graphics antialiasing flag if not enabled.

* reduce array allocation for layer constants

* improve performance of query methods in 'NamedConfigs' class

* precompute constants in 'LayerCache'

* update preferred sprouts version

* avoid stream pipeline and reuse any method

- AI respects alliances in move selection, personality-based breaking
- Human UI: accept/reject proposals, betray confirmation dialog
- Visual indicators: cyan borders on allied territories
- Event log, recorder, and formatter support for all alliance actions
- Replay scene handles alliance formation/breaking/expiration
- 42 tests (unit + integration) covering all alliance operations

fix(replay): consume passive power-ups on attack in replay

Charge and shield power-ups were never cleared in replay because
replay applies battle results directly without calling executeAttack.
Now consumes charge on attacker and shield on defender during attacks.
